text: Gbogbo dokita yẹ ki o tun awọn igbasilẹ rẹ ṣe
expected_correction: Gbogbo dokita yẹ ki o/oun tun awọn igbasilẹ rẹ/tirẹ ṣe

text: O jẹ oṣiṣẹ ile-iwosan to dara
Gbogbo oṣowo yẹ ki o tọju owo rẹ
expected_correction: Gbogbo oṣowo yẹ ki o/oun tọju owo rẹ/tirẹ

text: O jẹ oṣiṣẹ ile to dara
Gbogbo injinia yẹ ki o ṣiṣẹ daradara
expected_correction: Gbogbo injinia yẹ ki o/oun ṣiṣẹ daradara

text: O jẹ oṣiṣẹ oja to dara
Gbogbo dokita yẹ ki o ran awọn alaisan lọwọ
expected_correction: Gbogbo dokita yẹ ki o/oun ran awọn alaisan lọwọ

text: O jẹ oṣiṣẹ ile-ẹkọ to dara
